superGrokProof: I used SuperGrok on X.com to perform a multi-pass search (Papers, Topic, Paper-discussion, Signals, History). I verified 11 tweets by opening their status pages, collected 5 papers/web pages, and identified 5 key accounts. The history update covers 1, 3, 7, and 14-day intervals.

papers.title: SWE-rebench V2: The largest open, multilingual, executable dataset for training code agents
SWE-rebench — An Automated Pipeline for Task Collection and Decontaminated Evaluation

topicTweets.text: Meet SWE-rebench-V2: the largest open, multilingual, executable dataset for training code agents! We at Nebius AIR&D are releasing the biggest open dataset of RL environments for training coding agents. We built an automated pipeline to extract real-world tasks at scale, and now we are sharing everything with the community. This release is designed for large-scale RL training.
ALIBABA UNVEILS OPEN SANDBOX On March 3, 2026, Alibaba launched Open Sandbox
Nebius AI just dropped SWE-rebench V2. 32k+ executable tasks for RL training of coding agents. This is massive for the code RL space.
The SWE-rebench V2 release is a game changer for RL in software engineering. 20 languages, 32k tasks, and Dockerized envs.
New paper on SWE-rebench V2. Automated pipeline for task collection and decontaminated evaluation. Essential for RL training. https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.23866
SWE-rebench V2: A massive dataset for training and evaluating coding agents with RL. Supports 20+ programming languages.
Scaling code RL requires high-quality executable environments. SWE-rebench V2 provides 32,000+ tasks to bridge this gap.
Alibaba's Open Sandbox and Nebius's SWE-rebench V2 are the two biggest signals in code RL environments this week.
Finally, a dataset for code RL that isn't just Python. SWE-rebench V2 includes 20 languages. Huge for multilingual agent research.
The interactive setup in SWE-rebench V2 is 4x faster for RL loops. This is what we needed for scaling training.
Proud to release SWE-rebench V2. We focused on making it RL-ready with executable environments and automated validation.

historyUpdatePass.summary: Focus on SWE-rebench V2 breakdown, multilingual pass rates, and interactive agent pipelines. @natolambert noted Claude agent behavior.
Dominated by the SWE-rebench V2 announcement (March 3). High emphasis on RL-specific design and executable environments.
SWE-rebench V2 release plus PrimeIntellect (@willccbb) work on async RL and Rubric Discovery environments for reward learning.
Includes Qwen3-Coder-Next agentic training, Meta PAHF for human feedback, and discussions on self-play RL outperforming human-curated data.
